_comment: Canonical design tokens for Terminal Talk. Edit this file, then run `node scripts/generate-tokens-css.cjs` to regenerate app/lib/tokens-window.js, docs/ui-kit/tokens.mjs, app/lib/palette-classes.css, and the GENERATED block in docs/colors_and_type.css. Never hand-edit those generated files.
_cb_palette_source: EX5 / v0.4. Colour-blind-friendly palette based on Paul Tol's qualitative 'muted' scheme — proven distinguishable under deutan / protan / tritan simulations. Applied when body[data-palette-variant='cb']. Users opt in via Settings > Playback > 'Colour-blind friendly palette'.
